recurring_credits.name: Companion Discount
recurring_credits.description: $100 discount for a companion on a round-trip ticket between Hawaii and North America on Hawaiian Airlines, each cardmember anniversary.
recurring_credits.source_excerpt: $100 discount for a companion for each account anniversary for a round trip travel between Hawaii and North America

_review_reason: $100 companion discount is conditional on flying Hawaiian Airlines round-trip Hawaii↔NA. It's not a true 'I get $100 in my account every year' credit. May not fit OpenCard's recurring_credits convention. Operator decision on whether to include conditional travel-discount credits. Note: card was migrated from Barclays to BoH but Barclays still services per search results — verify current issuer.
_excluded: $10 off onboard purchases for Atmos status holders (conditional on status)
